description_long: This government building, labeled 'Millennium Mills', features a prominent central block with a white facade and large, evenly spaced windows. The structure is flanked by two distinct wings: one with a reddish-brown brick exterior and another with a more modern, gray concrete appearance. The roof is flat and expansive, with subtle texturing and visible rooftop details. The building sits on a landscaped base with green patches suggesting grass or shrubbery. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional, industrial architecture. The main facade is marked by the building's name in large letters, indicating its public or administrative function.
description: A large, multi-wing government building with a white central facade, brick and concrete side wings, and a flat roof, labeled 'Millennium Mills'. The structure is utilitarian and industrial in style, with prominent windows and minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main white facade with 'Millennium Mills' signage, flanked by a gray concrete wing on the left and a reddish-brown brick wing on the right.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the building, showing the gray concrete wing in the foreground and the brick wing extending to the rear.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the building, with the brick wing more prominent and the white central block visible but less detailed.
description_view_3: The right side view emphasizes the white central block and the gray concrete wing, with the brick wing receding into the background.
attribute_public_entrance_design: The main public entrance is set within the central white facade, featuring a series of large, evenly spaced windows and likely accessible doors at ground level. The entrance is straightforward and functional, with no grand staircases or ornate detailing, reflecting the building's industrial character.
